use_cases: Hero sections with animated typography that reveals as users scroll
Landing pages with progressive text reveals for storytelling
Section introductions with staggered word animations
Portfolio and portfolio-style presentations with scroll-triggered text
Storytelling sections that build narrative through scroll-based word reveals
ai_summary: A scroll-triggered text animation component that progressively reveals words as users scroll through the content, creating an engaging "magic" text effect. Built with motion/react, each word fades in sequentially using scroll position to control opacity transitions. Ideal for hero sections and storytelling layouts where text reveal timing enhances the narrative.
